playbook.intent: Fragmented per-dev tooling → all 2-10 devs reference the same faion playbook set with company-specific overlays cleanly shadowing defaults.
playbook.scope: A product-dev team adopts faion as the shared methodology base. Company-specific overlays (security policy, ADR template, RFC format, internal tech-radar) cleanly shadow faion defaults without forking the corpus. Devs reference the same playbooks; the company prompt library, role cheatsheets, and team charter overlay where needed.

success-criteria.criterion: Every dev references the same faion playbook set
Company overlays defined for: security policy, ADR template, RFC format, tech-radar
Onboarding folds the overlay in by day 30

stage.name: Baseline + overlay design
stage.intent: Pick the faion baseline + design the overlay shape that doesn't fork.

tasks.task: Pick faion baseline (which playbooks apply day 1)
Design overlay surfaces (security, ADR, RFC, tech-radar)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with explicit overlay-vs-fork choice on paper. Forking is the failure mode.

stage.name: Wire team charter + role cheatsheets
stage.intent: Working agreement + per-role cheatsheets land in repo.

tasks.task: Generate role cheatsheets (PM, PdM, Architect, BA, Dev, DevOps, QA)
Apply onboarding-30-day so day-1 devs absorb the overlay

stage.decision-gate: Advance when charter + cheatsheets are merged. Verbal agreements decay in 4 weeks.

stage.name: Commit overlays + decisions
stage.intent: Overlay artefacts (ADR template, RFC template, tech-radar) live in repo with ADRs explaining why.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: ADRs + overlay artefacts. Without ADRs, a new dev re-litigates the overlay.

extra.value: [Forking the faion corpus — overlays only, Replacing OKR or release cadence — see quarter-planning-okr-reset and feature-flag-rollout-decision, Migrating away from existing tracker — handled separately]
[Team agrees to a single methodology base, 'Versioned agent-memory files in repo (mistakes.md, patterns.md, decisions.md)', AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md context pyramid in place]

[Forking faion 'just to fix one thing' — diverges in 6 weeks, Overlays without ADRs — re-debated every quarter, Role cheatsheets out of date — agents stop using them, 'Team charter is a slide, not a checked-in file — bus-factor failure']
['If I delete the overlay, does the team fall back to the faion default cleanly?', 'Do all 5+ roles have a current cheatsheet?', 'Are the overlays explained by ADRs?']

{human: faion get-content adopt-faion-org-wide-overrides --format md, agent: faion get-content adopt-faion-org-wide-overrides --format context, json: faion get-content adopt-faion-org-wide-overrides --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
